message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor white
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam stereotypeCBackgroundColor #90EE90
skinparam stereotypeCBorderColor black

class ApproveEvent {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +View()
    +AcceptEvent()
    +RejectEvent()
}

class ResetPassword {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +ResetPassword(Email : String)
}

class SignUp {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +SignUp(FName : String, Lname : String, Email : String, Password : String)
    +SignIn()
}

class SendFeedback {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +SubmitFeedback(Description : String)
    +Cancel()
}

class Admin {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +View()
    +AcceptUser()
    +RejectUser()
    +BlockUser()
    +DeleteUser()
}

class SignIn {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +SignIn(Email : String, Password : String)
    +ForgetPassword()
    +SignUp()
}

class Index {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +View()
    +Search(Query : String)
    +JoinEvent()
}

class Dashboard {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +View()
    +Search(Query : String)
    +AcceptRequest()
    +RejectRequest()
    +EditActivity()
    +EndActivity()
    +CancelRequest()
    +EditRequest()
    +SendFeedback()
}

class Feedbacks {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +View()
    +Reply()
}

class ReplyFeedback {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +SubmitReply(Description : String)
    +Cancel()
}

class Reports {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +DisplayUser(Model : User)
    +DisplayEvent(Model : Event)
    +DisplayFeedback(Model : Feedback)
}

class Profile {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +EditProfile(FName : String, LName: String, Email : String, Password : String)
    +DiscardChange()
}

class EventManager {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +View()
    +Search(Query : String)
    +AcceptEvent()
    +RejectEvent()
    +EditEvent()
    +EndEvent()
}

class NewEvent {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +SubmitEvent(Name : String, Description: String, Dates[] : Date)
    +Cancel()
}

class EditEvent {
    +Render()
    +Home()
    +EditEvent(Name : String, Description: String, Dates[] : Date)
    +DiscardChange()
}

ApproveEvent -- Admin
ResetPassword -- SignIn
SignUp -- SignIn
SendFeedback -- Feedbacks
Admin -- Reports
Admin -- SignIn : Admin
SignIn -- Index : User
Index -- Dashboard
Index -- Profile
Index -- EventManager
Dashboard -- Feedbacks
Feedbacks -- ReplyFeedback
Profile -- EventManager
EventManager -- NewEvent
EventManager -- EditEvent

@enduml
